workflow.name: MariaDB HA existing
workflow.description: Bootstrap and validate MariaDB HA from an existing automation runner and target inventory.

data.label: Prepare MariaDB inventory
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
apt-get update
DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y ansible sshpass
cat >/tmp/mariadb-inventory.ini <<'INVENTORY'
[mariadb]
10.31.81.11 role=mariadb name=mariadb-01
10.31.81.12 role=mariadb name=mariadb-02
10.31.81.13 role=mariadb name=mariadb-03
INVENTORY

data.label: Install MariaDB container runtime
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/mariadb-runtime.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: mariadb
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.shell: |
        if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          docker --version
          exit 0
        fi
        if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          apt-get update
          DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y docker.io docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          dnf install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          yum install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        fi
        systemctl enable --now docker
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/mariadb-inventory.ini /tmp/mariadb-runtime.yml

data.label: Render MariaDB cluster manifests
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/mariadb-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: mariadb
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.file:
        path: /opt/octastack/mariadb
        state: directory
        mode: "0750"
    - ansible.builtin.copy:
        dest: /opt/octastack/mariadb/compose.yml
        mode: "0640"
        content: |
          services:
            mariadb:
              image: mariadb:11.4
              container_name: octastack-mariadb
              restart: unless-stopped
              environment:
                MARIADB_ROOT_PASSWORD: "change-me"
                MARIADB_DATABASE: "app_db"
                MARIADB_USER: "app_user"
                MARIADB_PASSWORD: "change-me"
              ports:
                - "3306:3306"
              volumes:
                - data:/var/lib/mysql
          volumes:
            data: {}
PLAYBOOK

data.label: Deploy MariaDB cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >>/tmp/mariadb-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/mariadb/compose.yml pull
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/mariadb/compose.yml up -d
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/mariadb/compose.yml ps
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/mariadb-inventory.ini /tmp/mariadb-deploy.yml

data.label: Document MariaDB topology
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/mariadb-topology.md <<'EOF'
# MariaDB HA topology

Members:
- mariadb-01: 10.31.81.11 (mariadb)
- mariadb-02: 10.31.81.12 (mariadb)
- mariadb-03: 10.31.81.13 (mariadb)

This example deploys one MariaDB container per member host. Replace the placeholder commands with vendor-supported clustering, TLS, backup, and failover automation before production use.
EOF
cat /tmp/mariadb-topology.md

data.label: Validate MariaDB cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
ansible -i /tmp/mariadb-inventory.ini mariadb -b -m shell -a 'docker ps --format "{{.Names}} {{.Status}}"'
